column1: # Kokoro TTS source (id <tab> text). Acronyms may be spelled phonetically so the
# letters are voiced — e.g. "C.I." → "see eye", not the word "sci"; the on-screen
# caption and .srt keep the plain "CI". Lines starting with # are skipped by regen.sh.

column2: Its own worktree. Its own real terminal.
A dozen of these at once.
It writes a plan — and stops. A second agent tries to refute it.
C.I. Hygiene. Then a third agent reads the diff.
And when it can't, it stops and tells you why.
Shepherd runs many agents at once — and it is built to stop.
